channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Revival of Digg: A New Era for Social Media - 2025 Edition
item.description: Digg is back in the game with a new partnership between Kevin Rose and Alexis Ohanian, aiming to create an online ecosystem with better vibes than current social media platforms.
item.dc:creator: Scott Nover, Fast Company

item.title: C++ founder champions profiles for memory safety
item.description: C++ memory safety issues have come under heat recently, with rising interest in projects like TrapC and Safe C++ that attempt to tackle the issue. But C++ designer Bjarne Stroustrup remains steadfast in promoting profiles as essential for safety in C++.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk’s court order against OpenAI gets blocked by federal judge
item.description: A federal judge has denied Elon Musk’s request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk’s claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: How CIOs can navigate a perfect digital storm of complexity, competition, and regulation
item.description: The banking, financial services, and insurance (BFSI) sector is facing a storm. In recent decades, the widespread adoption of the internet and the subsequent smartphone revolution have empowered consumers and businesses to look beyond incumbent providers of financial services.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple debuts new MacBook Air, Mac Studio with AI-ready chips
item.description: Both machines became available for preorder Wednesday and arrive in stores on March 12, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg News, The Mercury News

item.title: Leaked DJI Osmo 360 image suggests GoPro and Insta360 should be worried – here's why
item.description: Leaked image seemingly shows the rumored DJI Osmo 360 alongside the Insta360 X4, leading us to draw certain conclusions.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Judge denies Elon Musk's request to block OpenAI for-profit conversion but welcomes trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — A federal judge has denied Elon Musk's request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk's claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Intel creates a digital audit trail to trace the origins of chips
item.description: Intel is creating a digital audit trail in its chip supply chain for customers to trace how a chip traveled through the development process before reaching a PC.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Rust 1.85 arrives with long-awaited async closures
item.description: Rust 1.85, the latest version of the burgeoning language positioned for speed, safety, and ease of use, has arrived, with new capabilities including async closures. The release also constitutes a stabilization of the Rust 2024 edition of the language.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Lawrence Livermore’s Brian Spears, Judy Hill on achieving unprecedented AI advancements
item.description: Powerful computing platforms let Lawrence Livermore evolve artificial intelligence to ultimately benefit government and Americans, lab’s top AI researchers say.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: AI and Data Exchange 2025: IDC’s Max Claps on agencies driving AI into mission areas
item.description: Federal use cases typically fall into one of five “swim lanes,” with most impacting customer or citizen services, said the IDC Insight's federal researcher. The post AI and Data Exchange 2025: IDC’s Max Claps on agencies driving AI into mission areas first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Do more with Python’s new built-in async programming library
item.description: There’s lots to do in this edition of the Python Report: Do more than one thing with Python’s async. Do the math faster in Python with NumPy. Do Python in Visual Studio Code, and do it the right way with our get-started guide.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The rising threat of shadow AI
item.description: Employees in a large financial organization began developing AI tools to automate time-consuming tasks such as weekly report generation. They didn’t think about what could go wrong. Within a few months, unauthorized applications skyrocketed from just a couple to 65.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IBM's Macaleer on the Evolution of AI and Its Impact on Government
item.description: IBM's Ryan Macaleer discusses the advancements in AI technology, particularly generative AI capabilities, and its applications in government agencies.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AI & Data Exchange 2025: Guidehouse’s Tracy Jones on AI readiness and key steps to prepare your organization
item.description: AI readiness must take into account people, technology and processes collectively, explains the associate director of Guidehouse’s AI and data practice.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network
